Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.guava

Interface MultimapValidator<K,V>

Type Parameters:
K - the type of key in the multimap
V - the type of value in the multimap
All Superinterfaces:
ExtensibleObjectValidator<MultimapValidator<K,V>,Multimap<K,V>>
public interface MultimapValidator<K,V> extends ExtensibleObjectValidator<MultimapValidator<K,V>,Multimap<K,V>>
Validates the requirements of a Multimap.

    Method
    Description

    asString, asString, getActual, getFailures, isEqualTo, isEqualTo, isInstanceOf, isNotEqualTo, isNotEqualTo, isNotInstanceOf, isNotNull, isNotOneOf, isNotSameObjectAs, isNull, isOneOf, isSameObjectAs

  • Method Details

    • keySet

      CollectionValidator<Set<K>,K> keySet()
      Returns a validator over Multimap.keySet().
      Returns:
      a validator over Multimap.keySet()

    • keySet

      MultimapValidator<K,V> keySet(Consumer<CollectionValidator<Set<K>,K>> consumer)
      Validates nested requirements. This mechanism can be used to group related requirements.
      Parameters:
      consumer - validates the Multimap.keySet()
      Returns:
      the updated validator

      MultimapValidator<K,V> isEmpty()
      Ensures that the actual value is empty.

    • size

      MultimapValidator<K,V> size(Consumer<SizeValidator> consumer)
      Validates nested requirements. This mechanism can be used to group related requirements.
      Parameters:
      consumer - validates the multimap's size
      Returns:
      the updated validator
